# F.A.S. Motorsports

> F.A.S. Motorsports is a three-generation, family-owned performance manufacturer based in Punta Gorda, Florida, operating since 2002. Every part is designed, machined, installed, and dyno-validated under one roof. Not a reseller. Not a drop-ship catalog.

## Business Identity

- **Legal Name:** F.A.S. Motorsports
- **Founded:** 2002
- **Type:** Vertically integrated performance parts manufacturer and installer
- **Ownership:** Family-owned, three generations
- **Tagline:** Fast. Aggressive. Superior.

## Contact & Location

- **Address:** 6161 Riverside Dr, Punta Gorda, FL 33982
- **Phone:** (812) 200-9012
- **Email:** sales@fasmotorsports.com
- **Website:** https://fasmotorsports.com

## Service Areas

- **In-person builds & installations:** Charlotte, Lee, and Sarasota Counties, FL (Southwest Florida)
- **Parts & kits:** Ships nationwide across the United States

## Core Services

- Supercharger systems (race-ported 2.7L Eaton, Whipple, custom configurations)
- Billet performance components (snouts, lids, throttle bodies, bearing plates, pulley hubs)
- Custom stainless fabrication (304 and 316L, TIG welded in-house)
- Complete dyno-validated power packages: FAS800, FAS850, FAS900, FAS1000, FAS 1X (800–1,000+ HP)
- IGLA anti-theft installation (certified installer, Southwest Florida)
- Dyno tuning and validation

## Supported Platforms

Hellcat, Dodge Charger, Dodge Challenger, Ram TRX, Jeep Trackhawk, GMC Denali, Ford F-150, Jeep Wrangler, and select high-performance platforms.

## Power Package Fuel Notes

- FAS800 / FAS850: 93 octane
- FAS900 / FAS1000 / FAS 1X: E85

## Key Differentiators

- In-house manufacturing: FAS designs and machines its own parts
- Every build dyno-validated before keys are returned
- 500+ completed builds since 2002
- 50+ years combined team experience
- IGLA certified installer (Charlotte, Lee, Sarasota counties)

## Social Profiles

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fasmotorsports
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/fasmotorsports
